Faculty / Assistant

Grounded answer desk

Local & ready

Ask Garrison about itself.

Answers are retrieved from the local documentation and installed fitting instructions, with the source paths kept in view.

Answer request

Search the local Garrison index. No external model or network call.

Retrieve ordered references and launch any matching in-product tour.

Preparing brief

    Improvement interview

    Answer one prompt at a time. Completed candidates are filed to the Improver review queue, never applied directly.
